PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.file_path; if ($toolName -in @('edit','create') -and $filePath -like '*.rs') { $newContent = $input.toolInput.new_str; if ($newContent -and ($newContent -match 'ethers::' -or $newContent -match 'use ethers' -or $newContent -match 'ethers_')) { Write-Error '🚫 HALİSÜLASYON KORUMASI: Bu proje ethers-rs DEĞİL, alloy kullanıyor!'; exit 2 } }"
